summary: Publish OMAD V04 dump-tray timeline guide with costs and micronutrients
description: Research the exact MuscleMeat lean chicken, AH ingredients and salmon rotation; compute a transparent Cronometer-inspired macro/micronutrient model; rebuild the existing OMAD guide as an English V04 evolution/timeline article; expose it in guides and timeline; deploy and verify live.
acceptance: Existing OMAD route becomes a polished public-safe V04 dump-and-bake article with exact ingredient amounts, product links, dated prices, package rhythm, chicken and salmon variants, one-shot cold-oven method, evolution timeline, macro totals, micronutrient totals and %DV, source/proxy caveats, sodium/iodine/vitamin D gaps, and a Cronometer-inspired visual section.
verification: python3 scripts/omad-v04-nutrition.py --check && npm test && npm run check && npm run check:seo && git diff --check

evidence.summary: Nutrition artifact check green; 55 unit tests green; site/public-boundary/feed/timeline checks green across 140 pages; SEO 0 regressions; desktop and 390px mobile browser proof; chicken/salmon dashboard toggle and 10-row cost table exercised.
